title: [CLOSED] - Stonecutter Salvage
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/6aK6bu4.png) ### [Join the discord to interact with me and others about Minecraft](https://discord.gg/QZUJtsbkcY)
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) OVERVIEW ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) This datapack uses the [Stonecutter](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Stonecutter) to recover ingredients to be recycled for other purposes.
Notes: - **THIS DATAPACK HAS BEEN DISCONTINUED**
Successor(s): - [Recipes Plus](https://modrinth.com/project/RWf9UJdD) (included)

## ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) FEATURES ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) - *Visit the [wiki](https://github.com/GenMode/Minecraft/wiki/%5BCLOSED%5D-%E2%80%90-Stonecutter-Salvage) for more information*
